title: Safety toolbox meeting before walkthrough
summary: Conduct a safety toolbox meeting prior to the preliminary walkthrough during site visits.

title: Stick to audit plan unless reality intervenes
summary: During site visits, adhere to the audit plan unless unexpected conditions require deviation.
evidence_quote: Stick to your plan… unless reality hits you in the face!

title: Use free templates for energy audit
summary: Free templates are available as tools for conducting energy audits.

title: Data analysis tools: RETScreen, Excel, ASHRAE Forms
summary: Use RETScreen, Excel, and ASHRAE Forms for data analysis during the audit.
